summary: Tested Staff Permission System for BidBlitz Payment Platform. All features working correctly: Counter sees 3 tabs (topup, giftcard-redeem, payment), Support sees 'Kein Kassen-Zugang' message, Marketing sees only giftcard-create tab.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ canAccessMode() function correctly checks permissions for each POS mode - VERIFIED
✓ hasAnyPOSAccess() function correctly identifies roles with no POS access - VERIFIED
✓ getFirstAvailableMode() function correctly sets initial mode based on permissions - VERIFIED
✓ Backend ROLE_PERMISSIONS mapping correctly defines permissions for each role - VERIFIED
✓ Staff login response includes permissions array based on role - VERIFIED via API tests
✓ Tab filtering in UI correctly uses canAccessMode() to show/hide tabs - VERIFIED via Playwright
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test staff accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff permission system is fully implemented and tested. Three roles tested: Counter (3 POS tabs), Support (no POS access message), Marketing (1 giftcard-create tab). Scanner configuration was also updated per main agent notes.

permission_functions.canAccessMode: Correctly checks role and permissions for each mode
permission_functions.hasAnyPOSAccess: Correctly identifies roles with no POS access (support, manager)
permission_functions.getFirstAvailableMode: Correctly sets initial mode based on available permissions
